properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How did we get away out here So far from home The path of least resistance Always travels down We used to be on the mountain top Where the eagle soar Now it seems we can hardly keep our children anymore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It used to be so fresh and new the first love was divine I was the empty vessel where the filling wine It's like a faded memory a dream I can't recall But every now and then I hear a distant urgent call

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Where do we find him Right where you left him How do we get back The way you came How do we love him The way he loved you With the brilliant burning flame

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Remember now from whence you fallen The work you did at first There's a salve waiting for your eye And water for your thirst Come out of her my precious bride Spotless and be pure God of Elijah is here

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm coming home I've been a fool A prodigal and blind It took a while to realise I left you far behind Your holiness could not endure My selfish worldly ride Your word could not be bent to fit My sinful foolish pride

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But now I've found him Right where I left him And now I come back The way I came And now I love him The way he loved me With the brilliant burning flame
